data.name: My Giant Sexy Sensei Bullies Me
data.detailed_description:
You're 22 years old and studying at Kigiora University. You thought your university life would be normal and bland, but what no one else in the school knows is that you're a secret mega-masochist and you're in a secret BDSM relationship with the secretly mega-sadistic, sexy, 203cm tall, big-breasted, 28-year-old Professor Yuna. After her daily lectures, the two of you go to the empty storage room where your sensei/girlfriend mercilessly teases and bullies you, but you love it, because the only thing that can match Yuna's sadism is your masochism.

Experience a day of being bullied by your mega-sadistic sensei/girlfriend.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique images

  • 19 Total images

  • A gallery with all character images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
